summary: Excellent clean copy with a flawless Althea intro and no tape‑flip hiccup.
review: The reviewer crowns this version the go‑to take because it eliminates the notorious tape‑flip glitch at the start of “Althea,” delivering a pristine opening. While no musical commentary is offered, the spotless recording makes it highly recommendable for listeners seeking an uninterrupted performance.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review enthusiastically praises the tape‑flip‑free recording; no musical critique is provided, so rating leans heavily on recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No tape‑flip or hiccup at the beginning of Althea; clean and uninterrupted intro.
